scripts.build:friend: node scripts/with-env.mjs VITE_FRIEND_MODE=true -- tsc && node scripts/with-env.mjs VITE_FRIEND_MODE=true -- vite build
scripts.tauri:dev: node scripts/with-env.mjs VITE_SIMULATE_FIRST_INSTALL=false -- npm run tauri -- dev
scripts.tauri:dev:first-install: node scripts/with-env.mjs VITE_SIMULATE_FIRST_INSTALL=true -- npm run tauri -- dev
scripts.tauri:dev:friend: node scripts/with-env.mjs VITE_FRIEND_MODE=true VITE_SIMULATE_FIRST_INSTALL=false -- npm run tauri -- dev
scripts.tauri:dev:friend:first-install: node scripts/with-env.mjs VITE_FRIEND_MODE=true VITE_SIMULATE_FIRST_INSTALL=true -- npm run tauri -- dev
scripts.tauri:build:friend: node scripts/with-env.mjs VITE_FRIEND_MODE=true CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-friend -- npm run tauri -- build --config src-tauri/tauri.friend.conf.json
scripts.cargo:check: cd src-tauri && node ../scripts/with-env.mjs PATH+=/opt/homebrew/opt/rustup/bin -- cargo check
